hard_boundaries: Does not prove production citation reliability
Evaluated on synthetic + public NIST corpus — not real enterprise data
NLI cross-encoder is not infallible; quantized ONNX is conservative on hedged financial language
Numeric policy claims require deterministic verifier, not NLI alone
Keyword proxy is not called faithfulness
